𝗘𝗧𝗖𝗛𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗 | Creating bootable operating system USB drives from an Android device.  🔥 Super Hot!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating bootable operating system USB drives from an Android device.
📅 Created: Sep 2018 • Updated: Jun 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Write OS images to USB drives on Android
✅ No root access required
✅ Supports modern GNU/Linux OS images
✅ Supports Raspberry Pi SD card images (unzipped)
✅ Telemetry collection for issue diagnosis (optional, F-Droid build available without telemetry)


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

🍴 220 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 10 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

EtchDroid is an open-source Android application designed to write OS images directly to USB drives. It allows users to create bootable operating system USBs from their mobile device without requiring root access, supporting a wide range of modern Linux distributions and Raspberry Pi images.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Assisting users in managing and reducing their digital screen time and breaking addictive scrolling habits on Android devices.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Bedtime Mode with customizable schedules and Do Not Disturb
✅ Interactive Material 3 Expressive widgets for tracking progress
✅ Mindful Gateway to pause non-whitelisted apps
✅ Backup & Restore functionality for settings and schedules
✅ Shield Mode to protect specific apps with pauses and limits
✅ Goal Pursuit for setting target usage times
✅ Session HUD overlay to display remaining session time
✅ Early Kick reminders or ejection from apps
✅ Expressive Design with fluid motion and adaptive typography

Zenith is an Android digital wellbeing assistant built with Material Design 3 Expressive. It helps users break addictive scrolling habits through proactive interventions, real-time monitoring, and a fluid, motion-rich user experience.

FlightGear is a free, open-source, cross-platform flight simulator developed by a global community. It offers realistic global scenery, complex weather modeling, and spaceflight capabilities, making it suitable for enthusiasts, researchers, and even FAA-approved training.

𝗙𝗙𝗙 | To provide an extremely fast and accurate file search capability that can be leveraged by developers, AI agents, and integrated into code editors and development tools.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an extremely fast and accurate file search capability that can be leveraged by developers, AI agents, and integrated into code editors and development tools.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Typo-resistant path and content search
✅ Frecency-ranked file access
✅ Background watcher
✅ Lightweight in-memory content index
✅ MCP server for AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, etc.)
✅ Pi agent extension
✅ Neovim plugin integration
✅ Fast and accurate file search as a library


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 305 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 48 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

FFF is a high-performance file search toolkit designed for both human developers and AI agents. It offers typo-resistant path and content searching, frecency-ranked file access, and an in-memory index, significantly outperforming traditional CLIs in long-running processes. It can be used as a standalone tool, a Neovim plugin, or integrated with AI agents via MCP or Pi extensions.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

WindowPet is a cross-platform desktop application that allows users to place animated pets or characters on their screen as overlays. Built with Tauri and React, it offers a variety of customization options and aims to provide a fun, non-intrusive companion experience without performance issues.

𝗖𝗟𝗢𝗨𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗣 | Identifying the origin IP addresses of websites protected by Cloudflare for penetration testing and security research.  🌟 Rising Fast!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Identifying the origin IP addresses of websites protected by Cloudflare for penetration testing and security research.
📅 Created: Oct 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ IPv4 & IPv6 support
✅ Multiple IPs detection
✅ Progress bar with live stats
✅ Dynamic Cloudflare IP detection
✅ Fast subdomain scanning using multiple threads
✅ Support for multiple wordlists and wordlist comments
✅ Multiple output formats (JSON, YAML, CSV, TXT)
✅ Verbose & quiet modes
✅ Filters out Cloudflare IPs
✅ Built-in and custom wordlist support
✅ Rate limiting
✅ Save results to a file


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 401 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 52 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CloudRip is a Python-based tool designed to uncover the real IP addresses of websites protected by Cloudflare. It achieves this by systematically checking subdomains and identifying those that do not resolve to Cloudflare's IP ranges, thereby revealing the origin server's IP.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
